# CoolIT Systems — CDU for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## CHx2000 (Flagship CDU)
- 2,000 kW capacity
- Single rack footprint
- Serves 12 NVL72 racks
- 2,100 LPM primary flow
- Stainless steel construction
- Ultracapacitor backup
- Six 9s availability (99.9999%)
- 66% more capacity than CHx1500

## CHx200 (Small Scale)
- 200 kW in 4U
- ASHRAE W+ warm water
- Good for single rack or small cluster

## Track Record
- 5M+ coldplates shipped
- 7 of top 10 supercomputers use CoolIT
- Partners with Staubli for quick disconnects

## Product page: coolitsystems.com/cdu-product/chx2000/
